standard_variable.semantic_intent: ICU length of stay duration summary
standard_variable.semantic_grain: one row per anchor-qualified summary target

identifier_normalization.subject_id_role: raw patientid should normalize to subject_id
identifier_normalization.hadm_id_role: not separately available in the current opening Amsterdam public mapping
identifier_normalization.stay_id_role: raw admissionid is the Amsterdam ICU-semantic stay-equivalent identifier and should normalize to stay_id

database_mapping.source_grain: one row per Amsterdam ICU-semantic admission record
database_mapping.target_grain: one row per standardized ICU-semantic stay-equivalent duration summary

summary_build_translation.window_start_translation: start at admissions_core.admittedat for ICU-semantic location scope
summary_build_translation.window_end_translation: end at admissions_core.dischargedat for ICU-semantic location scope
summary_build_translation.qualifying_row_translation: retain only Amsterdam ICU-semantic admissions with location in (IC, IC&MC, MC&IC)
summary_build_translation.selection_translation: one Amsterdam admissionid within the ICU-semantic same-name scope maps directly to one retained duration summary row
summary_build_translation.aggregation_translation: derive duration from raw admittedat/dischargedat offsets, convert milliseconds to days, and round half away from zero to 3 decimal places
summary_build_translation.no_source_row_translation: if admittedat or dischargedat is missing, retain null std_icu_los_days and set icu_los_observation_status=missing_raw_offsets

validation_contract.no_source_row_policy_check: rows with missing admittedat or dischargedat may remain only when std_icu_los_days is null and icu_los_observation_status=missing_raw_offsets
notes: MC-only admissions remain outside the same-name ICU scope for std_icu_los_days.
The retained primary source is raw admittedat/dischargedat offsets rather than the reported lengthofstay summary field.

execution_contract.formal_output_rule: The governed execution.py entrypoint should read this mapping spec and delegate to the current local reviewed implementation until a more fully spec-native runner replaces it.
execution_contract.non_bypassable_target_rule: Formal std_icu_los_days outputs for AmsterdamUMCdb-1.0.2 should be produced only through the governed execution.py path rather than side SQL or ad hoc rebuilds.
